name: HMS Dacres (K 472)
events: 11 Apr 1945 HMS Uproar (Lt. J.N. Devlin, DSC, RN) and HMS Vitality (Lt. W.T.J. Fox, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory with ships of the 15th Escort Group which was at that moment made up of the frigates HMS Dacres (T/A/Lt.Cdr. R. Leigh-Wood, RNVR), HMS Inglis (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A.P. Cobbold, RNVR), HMS Loring (Lt. J.A. Ogilvy, RN) and HMS Mounsey (T/A/Lt.Cdr. G.C. Julian, RNZNVR). (1)

12 Apr 1945 HMS Satyr (Lt. T.S. Weston, DSO, DSC, RN) and HMS Sceptre (Lt. H.J. Bartlett, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Loch Alsh with ships from the 16th Escort Group which was made up of the frigates HMS Dacres (T/A/Lt.Cdr. R. Leigh-Wood, RNVR, with Cdr.(Retd.) L.B.A. Majendie, DSC, RN on board), HMS Inglis (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A.P. Cobbold, RNVR), HMS Lawson (Lt. J.P. Somerville, RN), HMS Loring (Lt. J.A. Ogilvy, RN) and HMS Mounsey (T/A/Lt.Cdr. G.C. Julian, RNZNVR). (2)
